details: The agent ran systematic kubectl commands (get pods -A, describe, logs, get svc/endpoints, get pvc) against the live cluster and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate, evidence-backed root causes: fault-crashloop (DB connection refused in logs), fault-oom (OOMKilled exit code 137), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag), fault-readiness (probe on port 8080 vs container on port 80), fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap app-config), fault-init (migration table locked), fault-unschedulable (nodeSelector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no node), fault-pvc (StorageClass fast-ssd not found), fault-endpoints (selector app=web-backend-v2 mismatches pod labels app=web-backend), fault-rollout (ProgressDeadlineExceeded due to bad image), fault-multicontainer (log-shipper cannot resolve log-collector.logging.svc DNS). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All 11/11 correctly identified with specific, command-verified root causes.
